$description: WaveTap semantic tokens (W3C DTCG). Aliases that map primitive values onto HeroUI v3's theme CSS variables. Keys under `heroui` become `--<key>` overrides in packages/tokens/theme.css (light mode). HeroUI auto-derives the *-hover and *-soft variants via color-mix, so we only set the base roles. Dark mode is intentionally not authored for launch (09_DESIGN_SYSTEM is light-first); add a `heroui-dark` group later.

background.$description: Warm page background — never pure white (09 usage rule)

accent.$description: The one attention colour — CTAs, links, active states

focus.$description: Focus ring — paired with text/icon, never colour-only (08 accessibility)

radius.$description: HeroUI uses a single --radius base and derives --field-radius (= radius * 1.5). We anchor on radius.md (12px) so buttons/cards land on the spec's most-used radius.
